subject: Fw:Donation
body:
Dear Jeffery
I am going to donate something if you are interested you can contact Sima Cohen
simalc@ofer-email.com

Sent from my Huawei Mobile

-------- Original Message --------
Subject: Donation
From: Sima Levy-Cohen
To: Sultan Bin Sulayem
CC:

Dear Sultan,
Following our discussion please find below the info-
Shoham has been battling cancer since he was five, and through long battles and even remission, cancer will just not leave this child’s body. Recently it has been found out that Shoham’s treatment, the only one that could potentially save his life, comes in an amount of ILS 2.5M, and those treatments are only available at Memorial Sloan Kettering in New York, which also means he must find a way to continuously come to the United States to receive treatment for his recovery. The funds raised through this campaign will only to be used for Shoham.

Bank transfer can be made to the following account:
Bank: Igud (13)
Branch: 095
Account Number: 46100000 (Larger Than Life)
 I double checked w them and they have no bank account abroad.
So far, 1.5M shekels have been raised.
These are the costs of treatment only, Family expenses are not included.
Warm regards,
Sima



Sent from my iPhone
NOTE: This e-mail message is subject to the Dubai World Group disclaimer see http://www.dubaiworld.ae/email_disclaimer

Dear Jeffery
I am going to donate something if you are interested you can contact Sima Cohen
simalc@ofer-email.com

Sent from my Huawei Mobile

-------- Original Message --------
Subject: Donation
From: Sima Levy-Cohen
To: Sultan Bin Sulayem
CC:

Dear Sultan,

Following our discussion please find below the info-

Shoham has been battling cancer since he was five, and through long battles and even remission, cancer will just not leave this child’s body. Recently it has been found out that Shoham’s treatment, the only one that could potentially save his life, comes in an amount of ILS 2.5M, and those treatments are only available at Memorial Sloan Kettering in New York, which also means he must find a way to continuously come to the United States to receive treatment for his recovery. The funds raised through this campaign will only to be used for Shoham.

 

Bank transfer can be made to the following account:

Bank: Igud (13)

Branch: 095

Account Number: 46100000 (Larger Than Life)

 I double checked w them and they have no bank account abroad. 

So far, 1.5M shekels have been raised.

These are the costs of treatment only, Family expenses are not included.

Warm regards,

Sima

 

 


Sent from my iPhone
